filesToChange: src/dashboard_builder.py (or a new script that uses it)
systemAnalysis.systemImpact: A new panel will be added to a Grafana dashboard. No impact on core services. Requires running a build script and updating Grafana.

executionSteps.description: Create or update a Python script to generate the new Grafana panel JSON using the DashboardBuilder class.

files.path: A new or existing dashboard generation script.
files.change: Add logic to create a time series panel for 'sat_stories_succeeded_total' and 'sat_stories_failed_total' metrics.

executionSteps.description: Add a corresponding test to verify the panel generation logic and ensure the output is valid JSON.

files.path: A new or existing test file for dashboard generation.
files.change: Add a test case that asserts the new panel's title, type, and metric targets are correct.

executionSteps.description: Run the script to generate the dashboard JSON and load it into Grafana.

rollbackPlan: If changes were made to existing files, revert them using 'git checkout <file_path>'.
If new files were created, remove them.
If the dashboard was updated in Grafana, revert to the previous version using Grafana's version history or re-upload the old configuration.
